name: vibrant-folk-madhubani
description: The six-color hand-painted folk register used by the Madhubani tee catalog. Body fill is one of three saturated colors; the remaining five appear as ornament across the seven decoration zones.

colors.name: deep-indigo
colors.notes: Default body fill for most subjects. Provides the strongest cool anchor.

colors.name: walnut-brown
colors.notes: Body fill for predators, large mammals, ground-dwellers. Warmer alternative to indigo.

colors.name: forest-teal
colors.notes: Body fill for serpents, reptiles, occasionally cats. Cool but distinct from indigo.

colors.name: saffron-orange
colors.notes: Primary warm decoration. Lotus medallions, saddle accents, ground-mark dots.

colors.name: vermillion-red
colors.notes: Sacred red — used sparingly for centers, hooves, sindoor accents.

colors.name: leaf-green
colors.notes: Vine motifs, leaf-vein panels, ground sprigs.

colors.name: cream-white
colors.notes: Breath color — used for negative space and ventral scales, cheek patches, eye whites.

colors.name: gold-yellow
colors.notes: Jewelry accent — small dot-bands, jewelry, sun-ray plumes.

colors.name: outline-black
colors.notes: Double-contour keylines — hand-drawn with weight variation in master-painter register.

background.notes: Cream cotton blank assumption. Renders use this as the background so the design is print-ready.
